text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Not too shabby, right? I made it onto the
scoreboard after all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yup, this feels about right. Nice and safe.
choice_data_list: You should be prouder of yourself!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yup, this feels about right. Nice and safe.
choice_data_list: You should be prouder of yourself!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing to be proud of, though. I didn't
win or anything.
choice_data_list:
It's proof that you have potential. You'll
definitely win next time!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh... I don't know how you can say things like
"definitely" with such conviction.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess it's good for my trainer to have
confidence in me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I won't go as far as to say I'll definitely win, but I can aim for it at least.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't go all drill sergeant on me! That won't
whip me into shape.
choice_data_list: So... you're okay with where you are then?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Of... course not. You know that.
choice_data_list: Then let's do even better next time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... You always try to make me say I'll do
better.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...But if I win, that means you'll stop, right?
